item.description: The President was at Dover Air Force Base in Delaware today for the dignified transfer of four military personnel killed in recent days in the Middle East as attacks between the U.S. and Iran have escalated. One of the families of the fallen then flew home to Georgia aboard Air Force One with President Trump. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump attends dignified transfer of U.S. troops
media:content.media:description: The President was at Dover Air Force Base in Delaware today for the dignified transfer of four military personnel killed in recent days in the Middle East as attacks between the U.S. and Iran have escalated. One of the families of the fallen then flew home to Georgia aboard Air Force One with President Trump. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

item.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of U.S. troops

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: The United States is about to enter its fifth month of war with Iran, and NBC News’ chief foreign correspondent Richard Engel has been covering all the developments.

media:content.media:text: Richard Engel on NBC's "TODAY" Show on July 20, 2022.
media:content.media:description: Richard Engel on NBC's "TODAY" show in 2022.

item.title: Send your questions for Richard Engel on the war with Iran and more

item.description: Madison, Wisconsin, police fatally shot a man that they say was armed with a knife after a report of someone "checking parked vehicles" authorities said. NBC News' Maggie Vespa reports.

media:content.media:title: Video shows Madison police shoot and kill man who allegedly was armed with a knife
media:content.media:description: Madison, Wisconsin, police fatally shot a man that they say was armed with a knife after a report of someone "checking parked vehicles" authorities said. NBC News' Maggie Vespa reports.

item.title: Video shows Madison police shoot and kill man who allegedly was armed with a knife

item.description: China and the Philippines traded accusations after an encounter between their vessels in contested South China Sea waters. Manila said one of its navy personnel was struck on the head with a wooden baton while Beijing said its law enforcement officers were provoked.

media:content.media:title: China and the Philippines clash near disputed South China Sea shoal
media:content.media:description: China and the Philippines traded accusations after an encounter between their vessels in contested South China Sea waters. Manila said one of its navy personnel was struck on the head with a wooden baton while Beijing said its law enforcement officers were provoked.

item.title: China and the Philippines clash near disputed South China Sea shoal

item.description: As the center of Tropical Storm Bertha churns over Southeast Louisiana, the storm is packing a punch. NBC News’ George Solis has the new images now coming in.

media:content.media:title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall
media:content.media:description: As the center of Tropical Storm Bertha churns over Southeast Louisiana, the storm is packing a punch. NBC News’ George Solis has the new images now coming in.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

media:content.media:text: Woman in a blue patient uniform gown sits alone on a bed in a private room and looking out the window in hospital, expressing her concern about the results of an examination. Sad patient and thinking stress anxiety with symptoms of depression and sadness,

item.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you

item.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Robinson
Delia Sara Rangel
Josh Feldman
Daniela Suarez
item.description: Tension is brewing between the White House and Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin, sources say.

media:content.media:text: Markwayne Mullin.
media:content.media:description: U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security Markwayne Mullin speaks during a news conference on July 17, 2026 in Washington, D.C.

media:content.media:text: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin Holds News Conference
media:content.media:description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin speaks in Washington on July 17.

media:content.media:text: WH Easter Egg Roll 2026
media:content.media:description: A Secret Service agent is seen during the White House Easter Egg Roll on April 6.

media:content.media:text: Odysseus in the AI-generated film "Odysseus: The Fall" and Matt Damon in "The Odyssey."
media:content.media:description: Odysseus in the AI-generated film "Odysseus: The Fall" and Matt Damon in "The Odyssey."

item.title: DHS chief’s early missteps and an AI-generated version of ‘The Odyssey’: Morning Rundown

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: Jordan, chair of the House Judiciary Committee, accused Smith of lying in his testimony before the committee in December. Smith’s lawyers denied he made any false statements.

media:content.media:text: US-POLITICS-PROSECUTION-CONSTITUTION-VOTE
media:content.media:description: Former special counsel Jack Smith testifies before the House Judiciary Committee about his investigations into President Donald Trump on Jan. 22.

media:content.media:text: Former US Special Counsel Jack Smith Testifies Before House Judiciary Committee
media:content.media:description: Former special counsel Jack Smith testifies before the House Judiciary Committee about his investigations into President Donald Trump on Jan. 22.

item.title: Rep. Jim Jordan formally asks DOJ to prosecute Jack Smith over congressional testimony

item.dc:creator: Joanna Stern
item.description: Samsung has owned the market for foldable phones. Now Apple is getting in on it. NBC News chief tech analyst Joanna Stern breaks it down.

media:content.media:text: Samsung New Product Launch
media:content.media:description: A person records a Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 smartphone at a Samsung Unpacked launch event in London on Wednesday.

item.title: The fight for the future of foldable phones is here

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
Marin Scott
item.description: Madison police said that after a chase and a struggle, a man who was being sought pulled out a knife and injured an officer, which led to the deadly shooting.

media:content.media:text: Madison Police Shooting
media:content.media:description: Protesters march after a Madison police officer shot and killed a man Wednesday, July 22, 2026, in Madison, Wis.

media:content.media:text: Madison Police Chief John Patterson provides an update on a fatal police shooting incident on Wednesday, July 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Madison Police Chief John Patterson speaks to the media after the fatal police shooting Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: People gather at the scene of the police shooting on Madison's Williamson Street on Wednesday, July 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: People gather at the scene of the police shooting on Madison's Williamson Street on Wednesday.

media:content.media:text: Protesters gather in Madison following a fatal police shooting on Wednesday, July 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Protesters gather following the fatal police shooting Wednesday.

item.title: Wisconsin officer kills man armed with knife, police say, as shooting sparks protests

item.dc:creator: Kelly O'Donnell
item.description: Despite the heightened environment, the Secret Service says it’s confident in plans for the rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.

media:content.media:text: WH Easter Egg Roll 2026
media:content.media:description: A Secret Service agent during the White House Easter Egg Roll in April.

media:content.media:text: Authorities Hold Press Conference At DC Hilton After Shooting At WHCA Dinner
media:content.media:description: A Secret Service agent during the White House Easter Egg Roll in April.

media:content.media:text: Security Scare at The White House Correspondents' Dinner with President Trump
media:content.media:description: A Secret Service agent during the White House Easter Egg Roll in April.

item.title: ‘Off the charts’: Secret Service describes rising threats to protectees

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked to dermatologists about the best way to avoid sun-related conditions outside of the usual sunburn, including heat rash and sun poisoning, plus the best treatments for these concerns

media:content.media:text: Evans and her mom have matching Ponyflo Sunblocker hats that she says she wears to avoid sunburn or worse.

item.title: The best ways to avoid (and treat) heat rash and sun poisoning, according to derms

item.dc:creator: Ashley Morris
item.description: This is everything you need to know about watching the 2026 MLS season, including streaming options and info on when the season takes place.

media:content.media:text: The 2026 MLS regular season runs through November 7, 2026.
media:content.media:description: The 2026 MLS regular season runs through November 7, 2026.

media:content.media:text: The 2026 MLS regular season runs through November 7, 2026.
media:content.media:description: The 2026 MLS regular season runs through November 7, 2026.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 MLS season

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked to laundry experts to learn how often you should change and wash your bedding and when it’s time to throw them out for a new set.

media:content.media:text: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.
media:content.media:description: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.

media:content.media:text: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.
media:content.media:description: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.

item.title: How often should you wash and change out your sheets? Experts explain

item.dc:creator: Morgan Greenwald
Ashley Morris
item.description: Dermatologists share the best hyaluronic acid serums and creams to hydrate, plump and smooth your skin from brands like CeraVe and The Ordinary.

media:content.media:text: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: Woman holding serum bottle and taking out dropper
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: Side by side image of woman before and after applying hyaluronic acid serum.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: A hand holding a small pump of Ilia The Base Face Milk in beside the Ilia bottle on a windowsill.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: Close-up of Lancôme Genifique Ultimate Serum on a windowsill.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

item.title: All the glow, none of the grease — the best hyaluronic acid products

item.dc:creator: Lauren Zola
item.description: Kolodin will face Democratic incumbent Adrian Fontes after defeating former state Republican Party chair Gina Swoboda, NBC News projects.

media:content.media:text: Alex Kolodin speaks while seated at a roundtable
media:content.media:description: Republican state Rep. Alexander Kolodin prepares to debate former Arizona Republican Party Chair Gina Swoboda in Phoenix on May 14.

item.title: Alexander Kolodin, who tried to overturn Arizona election results, wins GOP nod for secretary of state

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
item.description: Democrat Amish Shah, a physician and former state lawmaker, has opened a lead in the primary for a key Arizona battleground district even though party leaders backed another candidate.

media:content.media:text: Former state Rep. Amish Shah, an emergency room doctor by trade, participates in the 2026 AZ Clean Elections primary debate for
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

media:content.media:text: Jay Feely, former NFL kicker and Republican Congressional candidate for Arizona, outside a polling location at Fountain Hills Community Center during a primary election in Fountain Hills, Arizona.
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

media:content.media:text: Rep. Juan Ciscomani walking outdoors.
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

item.title: Arizona Democrats reject party leaders’ pick for a key battleground district

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Investigative genetic genealogy helped identify Mayra Velasquez, 42, as the suspect in Irasema Chavez’s 2012 stabbing death in the Arlington cold case.

media:content.media:text: Irasema Chavez.
media:content.media:description: Irasema Chavez.

item.title: 14 years after woman was stabbed 100 times, her close friend was arrested

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: The doctor who performed the autopsy said in the report that he couldn’t rule out foul play in the Mississippi teen’s death.

media:content.media:text: Press conference in Manhattan regarding the death of Nolan Xavier Wells
media:content.media:description: A person holds a placard that reads "Justice for Nolan" outside of the National Action Network headquarters in New York on July 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells with his parents.
media:content.media:description: Nolan Wells with his parents.

item.title: Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy results in ‘undetermined’ cause and manner of death

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
item.description: Jason Alexander is apologizing after Courtney Stodden publicly called out the “Seinfeld” star over a lewd 2012 comedy sketch the two made when Stodden was 17.

media:content.media:text: Composite image of Jason Alexander and Courtney Stodden
media:content.media:description: Jason Alexander, left, and Courtney Stodden, right.

item.title: Jason Alexander apologizes to Courtney Stodden for ‘inappropriate’ skit they did when she was 17
